---
title: "spenceR blog"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
library(shiny)
```


Name in progress.

<hr style="border-color:#192F4D;margin-top:0;border-top:2px solid;"/>

## <a href="blog-2021-09-03.html">Autonumeric Inputs in R!</a>

<hr style="border-color:#192F4D;margin:0;"/>

```{r}

fluidRow(
  column(
    width = 3,
    tags$img(
      src = "resources/blog/2021-09-03/preset-inputs-2.PNG",
      width = "100%"
    )
  ),
  column(
    width = 9,
    p(
      "A short post about a (somewhat) recent addition to {shinyWidgets} that allows for beautifully formatted numeric inputs in {shiny} applications.",
      style = "font-size: 14pt"
    ),
    p(
      "Date: 2021-09-03",
      style = "color:#6D2231; font-size: 14pt; padding-top:15px; font-weight:bold;"
    ),
    p(
      "Categories: R, Shiny",
      style = "color:#6D2231; font-size: 14pt; font-weight: bold;"
    )
  )
)

```

<hr style="border-color:#192F4D;margin-top:0;border-top:2px solid;"/>
